docs.title: Mathematics: Analysis and Approaches with Ms Soh
Question
docs.text:
Find the derivative of: $$ f(x) = x^2 \sin x $$

Show Solution

Solution: $$ f'(x) = 2x \sin x + x^2 \cos x $$

docs.title: IB Topical Questions and Solutions
docs.text:
Welcome to the IB Topical Questions and Solutions section.

The SL MAA section is meant for students taking SL MAA and also students taking HL MAA.

The HL MAA section contains the additional HL content and is for HL students only.

docs.title: HL MAA Topical Questions and Solutions
docs.text:
Here, we look at selected questions from the IB exams, organised by topic.

It is recommended that you try the questions before looking at the solutions.

The questions are organised according to the following strands:

1. Number and Algebra

2. Functions and Graphs

3. Geometry and Trigonometry

4. Calculus

5. Statistics and Probability

docs.title: Trigonometric Graphs from the Unit Circle
docs.text: This exploration investigates how the graphs of the trigonometric functions arise from the unit circle.
